ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the state was admitted to the US */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state in people per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the capital city belongs to */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the capital city in feet */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the capital city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South, Midwest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_regions" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the state belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state in people per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "us_house_seats" (
  "house_seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each US House seat record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of US House seats for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the US House seat data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_us_house_seats_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the state data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the state data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was downloaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data downloaded (e.g., population, US House seats) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization created (e.g., map, chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit log was created */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the audit log changes */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit log changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the system log was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the system log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the system log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the system log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
